instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved via architecture description languages (ADLs) including ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs for defining component interfaces, interconnections, and composition; combined with MathWorks Simulink, simulation tools and methods, and general-purpose programming languages such as C++ or Java to handle heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives across different modeling notations."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], and MontiArc [25], [26] for architecture description languages (ADLs), with specific use of SysML v1.7 for state machine behavior modeling. These standards facilitate interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders and perspectives [31]."
]
